先生、この前はありがと！ レポート、ばっちりだったよ！<br>だから、今日はその:
Teacher, thanks for the other day! My report was spot-on! So today's
my thank-you date!
先生に、何かお礼にプレゼント買いたいんだけど、何がいい～？<br>あっ……言っと:
I want to buy you a present to say thanks, but what do you want? Oh,
but just so you know, no expensive stuff! I don't have any money!
ん～、何が似合うかなぁ～？ あっ、こっちのお洋服可愛い！<br>おおっ、こっちの:
Hmm, what would suit you? Oh, these clothes are cute! Ooh, this
perfume smells great!♪
……って、気がついたら、<br>あたしのモノばっかり買っちゃってたぁ～～っ！: Wait, before I knew it, I'd only bought stuff for myself!
まぁ……い、いいよねっ！<br>先生にとっては、あたしが可愛くなるのが一番のプレ:
Well... i-it's fine, right? For you, Teacher, me getting cuter is the
best present, isn't it?♪
